articles.description: Houston Rockets vs. New Orleans Pelicans: Game Highlights
articles.headline: Houston Rockets vs. New Orleans Pelicans: Game Highlights

images.name: Washington Wizards vs. Portland Trail Blazers: Game Highlights
images.caption: Washington Wizards vs. Portland Trail Blazers: Game Highlights

articles.description: — Toumani Camara scored 23 points and the Portland Trail Blazers routed the Washington Wizards 123-88 on Sunday.
articles.headline: Camara has 23 for the Trail Blazers in 123-88 rout of the Wizards

images.name: Washington Wizards vs. Portland Trail Blazers: Game Highlights
images.caption: Washington Wizards vs. Portland Trail Blazers: Game Highlights

articles.description: Washington Wizards vs. Portland Trail Blazers: Game Highlights
articles.headline: Washington Wizards vs. Portland Trail Blazers: Game Highlights

images.name: Boston Celtics vs. Charlotte Hornets: Game Highlights
images.caption: Boston Celtics vs. Charlotte Hornets: Game Highlights

articles.description: — Jayson Tatum scored 32 points, Payton Pritchard added 28 points and the Boston Celtics defeated the cold-shooting Charlotte Hornets 114-99 on Sunday night for their third straight victory.
articles.headline: Jayson Tatum, Payton Pritchard help push Celtics past the Hornets 114-99

images.name: Orlando Magic vs. Toronto Raptors: Game Highlights
images.caption: Orlando Magic vs. Toronto Raptors: Game Highlights

articles.description: — RJ Barrett scored 24 points, Scottie Barnes had 23 points and a career-high 15 assists, and the Toronto Raptors used a 31-point run to rout Orlando 139-87 on Sunday night, handing the slumping Magic their seventh loss in eight games.
articles.headline: Barnes has career-high 15 assists, Raptors score 31 straight points to rout slumping Magic 139-87

images.name: Sacramento Kings vs. Brooklyn Nets: Game Highlights
images.caption: Sacramento Kings vs. Brooklyn Nets: Game Highlights

articles.description: — Ochai Agbaji scored 18 points in 25 minutes off the bench and the Brooklyn Nets snapped a 10-game losing streak with a 116-99 win over the Sacramento Kings on Sunday night.
articles.headline: Nets rout Kings 116-99 to end 10-game losing streak

videos.description: Denver Nuggets vs. Golden State Warriors: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Denver Nuggets vs. Golden State Warriors: Game Highlights) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Denver Nuggets vs. Golden State Warriors: Game Highlights

videos.description: The Warriors move to 2-0 to start the NBA season thanks in part to Steph Curry's 42 points against the Nuggets.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Curry dazzles with 42 points as Warriors win OT thriller) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Curry dazzles with 42 points as Warriors win OT thriller

videos.description: Nikola Jokic scores from his tip-toes after a nice feed from Cam Johnson.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jokic tip-toes in for an easy basket) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jokic tip-toes in for an easy basket

videos.description: Stephen Curry knocks down his first attempt from beyond the arc vs. the Nuggets.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Curry's first shot is this impressive 3-pointer) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Curry's first shot is this impressive 3-pointer

videos.description: Christian Braun is the recipient of a beautiful pass from Nikola Jokic and finishes it off with a dunk.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jokic needs only a sliver of space for this assist) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jokic needs only a sliver of space for this assist

videos.description: Aaron Gordon is feeling it from deep after drilling his seventh 3-pointer of the first half.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Gordon cashes in his seventh 3-pointer of 1st half) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gordon cashes in his seventh 3-pointer of 1st half

videos.description: Jamal Murray splits two defenders on his way to the basket for a layup.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jamal Murray gets to the rim with patience) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jamal Murray gets to the rim with patience

videos.description: Jonathan Kuminga improvises to get a bucket for the Warriors.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Kuminga uses his craftiness for a layup) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kuminga uses his craftiness for a layup

videos.description: Stephen Curry hits a catch and shoot 3-pointer to get the Warriors going.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Curry buries it from deep) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Curry buries it from deep

videos.description: Stephen Curry goes high off the glass to drop in the and-1 layup.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Curry scoops it up and in plus the foul) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Curry scoops it up and in plus the foul

videos.description: Jamal Murray closes the third quarter with a fortuitous 3-pointer for the Nuggets.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jamal Murray gets a friendly bounce on his 3-pointer) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jamal Murray gets a friendly bounce on his 3-pointer

videos.description: Al Horford's corner 3-pointer gives the Warriors the lead after trailing by as much as 14 points.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Al Horford hits a momentous 3 for Warriors) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Al Horford hits a momentous 3 for Warriors

videos.description: Jonathan Kuminga skies for big slam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jonathan Kuminga skies for big slam) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jonathan Kuminga skies for big slam

videos.description: Aaron Gordon comes up big for the Nuggets with 42 points on an 10-0 run.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Gordon hits 40-point mark after 4 straight buckets) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gordon hits 40-point mark after 4 straight buckets

videos.description: Steph Curry ties the score for the Warriors late in the 4th quarter with a clutch 3-pointer.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Steph Curry shimmies after hitting game-tying 3) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Steph Curry shimmies after hitting game-tying 3

videos.description: Aaron Gordon makes his 10th 3-pointer of the night to put the Nuggets ahead 120-117.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Aaron Gordon hits a go-ahead 3) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Aaron Gordon hits a go-ahead 3

videos.description: Steph Curry dials one up from way downtown to send Warriors-Nuggets to overtime.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Curry does it again with a deep 3 to send game to OT) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Curry does it again with a deep 3 to send game to OT

videos.description: Aaron Gordon gets the and-1 to fall

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Aaron Gordon gets the and-1 to fall) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Aaron Gordon gets the and-1 to fall

videos.description: Nikola Jokic can't convert on a chance to put the Warriors away in regulation.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jokic misses game-winning opportunity for Nuggets) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jokic misses game-winning opportunity for Nuggets

videos.description: Jimmy Butler is left all alone from beyond the arc and swishes it through to extend the Warriors' lead late.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jimmy Butler nails dagger 3 to seal Warriors' win in OT) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jimmy Butler nails dagger 3 to seal Warriors' win in OT

videos.description: Steph Curry comes through with 16 consecutive points for the Warriors down the stretch.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (On fire! Steph goes off for 16 straight points for Warriors) 2025/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: On fire! Steph goes off for 16 straight points for Warriors
